summary: Final-year B.E. Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) student with hands-on experience in Generative AI, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Flutter development, and AI-powered application development. Experienced in building multi-model AI assistants, mobile applications, TensorFlow-based deep learning projects, and SaaS platforms. Strong foundation in Python, TensorFlow, FastAPI, Firebase, Flutter, NLP, and modern AI development workflows.

description: Worked on automation testing projects and contributed to improving testing workflows.
Performed software testing, bug identification, and report generation for application performance analysis.
Gained hands-on experience with automation tools, debugging, and quality assurance practices.
Completed Deloitte Job Simulation focused on data analysis and forensic technology.
Created interactive data dashboards using Tableau.

projects.title: MITRA-AI: AI Chatbot & Assistant Platform
description: Designed and built a production-grade agentic AI platform integrating 5 LLM providers (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kimi K2) with intelligent NLP-based routing implementing core agentic patterns: reasoning, planning, tool-use, and autonomous workflow execution.
Architected a scalable Python/FastAPI backend with multi-agent orchestration, async request handling, and enterprise-style REST API design analogous to Azure AI Foundry's agent service architecture.
Implemented MCP (Model Context Protocol) awareness and prompt engineering strategies to optimize context-aware, multi-turn LLM interactions across providers.
Deployed on AWS with Git-based version control designed for responsible AI output with logging and performance monitoring across agent pipelines.

projects.title: BookMyTurf
description: Developed a sports turf booking and management platform for players and turf owners.
Implemented real-time turf booking, slot management, and authentication features.
Integrated Firebase backend services for booking management and user data storage.
Designed a responsive and sports-oriented user experience.

projects.title: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) with TensorFlow
description: Developed and trained GAN models using TensorFlow for image generation tasks.
Implemented Generator and Discriminator architectures to understand adversarial learning concepts.
Built custom training loops and optimized training performance.
Generated synthetic images using deep learning techniques.

projects.title: SRCNN Super-Resolution Implementation
description: Implemented a Super-Resolution Convolutional Neural Network (SRCNN) for image enhancement.
Applied TensorFlow and Keras to reconstruct high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs.
Used OpenCV for preprocessing, interpolation, and image enhancement workflows.
Evaluated performance using PSNR and visual comparison techniques.

projects.title: CNN Implementations
description: Built and tested CNN-based deep learning implementations using Python and TensorFlow.
Developed lightweight experimental models for understanding image classification workflows.
Explored model execution, training pipelines, and neural network concepts.
